chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-249 of 2023 Const. Petition No.D-353 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 06-09-2023 Mr.Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for petitioner in C.P.No.D-353/23 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G a/w Abdul Majeed Memon, Executive Engineer, Education & Works Division, Khairpur and Attiq-ur-Rehman Memon, Assistant Education Officer, ES&HS, Khairpur. ***** When these petitions were taken up on 16.03.2023, presence of the Executive Engineer, Education & Works Division, Khairpur was marked and certain directions were issued for rehabilitation of damaged schools in district Khairpur and making makeshift arrangements for running of damaged schools meanwhile. A copy of order was communicated to the relevant authorities including Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur to ensure removal of encroachment and inspecting smooth running of Primary School No.1 Kingri. However, it appears that since then nothing has happened despite lapse of six months. The officials present in Court state that although they have written letters, sent estimation and preliminary cost-1 (PC-1) for above purpose, but have not received any reply from the Finance Department or the authority concerned. Although, it was being claimed by the previous Government that the donation received on account of flood devastation has been distributed to the people and to the relevant 2 department for uplifting the infrastructure. We are surprised to hear and are at loss to understand as to where the money went, if not spent over rehabilitation of schools in the area badly hit by the flood and furnishing them with furniture.

Although, it was being claimed by the previous Government that the donation received on account of flood devastation has been distributed to the people and to the relevant 2 department for uplifting the infrastructure. We are surprised to hear and are at loss to understand as to where the money went, if not spent over rehabilitation of schools in the area badly hit by the flood and furnishing them with furniture. In these circumstances, we issue notice to the Chief Secretary, Sindh to explain such position reminding him that if we are not satisfied with his report, we would call him in person for taking action in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the Chief Secretary, Sindh and learned AAG for perusal and compliance. Adjourned to 21.09.2023, when the Chief Engineer, Education & Works Department, Sukkur shall be in attendance. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected petition. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
